# Contributing

## Add a paper idea

1. Edit [`paper_ideas.md`](paper_ideas.md)
2. Open a pull request

## Add a discussed paper / event

1. Edit [`_data/papers.yml`](_data/papers.yml)
2. (Optional) Add slides and any demo code under a dated directory (e.g. `YYYY.MM.DD-Title/`).
3. Open a pull request

## Local preview

If you have Ruby + Bundler installed, you can preview the GitHub Pages site with:

```sh
bundle exec jekyll serve
```

Or use any static file server if you only change HTML/CSS/JS.
